title: cassine peragua subsp. affinis
intro: Cassine peragua subsp. affinis, also known as Cassine peragua, is a plant species belonging to the family Celastraceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Cassine peragua subsp. affinis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
